## Meeting Purpose

[To discuss GrowthX's progress, product development, and potential investment opportunity with Andreessen Horowitz partners.](https://fathom.video/share/nVPJVyz67seDbK9Ji5xprhXXsu_6CWe6?tab=summary&timestamp=63.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has developed an AI-powered content creation platform, combining advanced workflows with human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/nVPJVyz67seDbK9Ji5xprhXXsu_6CWe6?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [The company has reached $11M run rate with high capital efficiency (only $230K burn in August)](https://fathom.video/share/nVPJVyz67seDbK9Ji5xprhXXsu_6CWe6?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)
  - [GrowthX is raising $40-60M to scale operations, expand product development, and capture market opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/nVPJVyz67seDbK9Ji5xprhXXsu_6CWe6?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
  - [A16z partners expressed interest, noting GrowthX's strong performance compared to other marketing companies they've evaluated](https://fathom.video/share/nVPJVyz67seDbK9Ji5xprhXXsu_6CWe6?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Platform Overview

  - [AI-powered content creation platform with context-aware assistants and AI editors](https://fathom.video/share/nVPJVyz67seDbK9Ji5xprhXXsu_6CWe6?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [Workflow encoding agent writes workflows as code for scalable execution](https://fathom.video/share/nVPJVyz67seDbK9Ji5xprhXXsu_6CWe6?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Features include deep research, drafting, fact-checking, and image generation](https://fathom.video/share/nVPJVyz67seDbK9Ji5xprhXXsu_6CWe6?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
  - [Platform currently used internally by GrowthX team, with plans to expose features to clients incrementally](https://fathom.video/share/nVPJVyz67seDbK9Ji5xprhXXsu_6CWe6?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)

### Traction and Financial Performance

  - [Reached $11M run rate without dedicated sales or marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/nVPJVyz67seDbK9Ji5xprhXXsu_6CWe6?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)
  - [40% win rate on \~$200K ACV deals](https://fathom.video/share/nVPJVyz67seDbK9Ji5xprhXXsu_6CWe6?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
  - [August metrics: $230K burn, added almost $2M in run rate](https://fathom.video/share/nVPJVyz67seDbK9Ji5xprhXXsu_6CWe6?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
  - [70%+ margins, trending upward](https://fathom.video/share/nVPJVyz67seDbK9Ji5xprhXXsu_6CWe6?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)

### Product Roadmap and Vision

  - [Building infrastructure to scale services, starting with content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/nVPJVyz67seDbK9Ji5xprhXXsu_6CWe6?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
  - [Developing knowledge vault and content roadmap features](https://fathom.video/share/nVPJVyz67seDbK9Ji5xprhXXsu_6CWe6?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
  - [Exploring adjacent services (e.g., e-commerce catalog management)](https://fathom.video/share/nVPJVyz67seDbK9Ji5xprhXXsu_6CWe6?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)
  - [Potential to offer platform to other agencies in the future](https://fathom.video/share/nVPJVyz67seDbK9Ji5xprhXXsu_6CWe6?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)

### Fundraising and Growth Plans

  - [Raising $40-60M to capitalize on market opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/nVPJVyz67seDbK9Ji5xprhXXsu_6CWe6?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
  - [Aims to expand engineering team from 15 to 25+ people](https://fathom.video/share/nVPJVyz67seDbK9Ji5xprhXXsu_6CWe6?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)
  - [Plans to invest in ML/AI team for model improvements and efficiency gains](https://fathom.video/share/nVPJVyz67seDbK9Ji5xprhXXsu_6CWe6?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)
  - [Focused on thoughtful, targeted fundraising process with select investors](https://fathom.video/share/nVPJVyz67seDbK9Ji5xprhXXsu_6CWe6?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)

## Next Steps

  - [A16z partners (Seema and Zach) to discuss internally and consult with growth team](https://fathom.video/share/nVPJVyz67seDbK9Ji5xprhXXsu_6CWe6?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)
  - [A16z to provide signal on continuing the conversation](https://fathom.video/share/nVPJVyz67seDbK9Ji5xprhXXsu_6CWe6?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
  - [GrowthX to share data room upon receiving positive signal from A16z](https://fathom.video/share/nVPJVyz67seDbK9Ji5xprhXXsu_6CWe6?tab=summary&timestamp=1656.0)
  - [Follow-up communication expected later the same day](https://fathom.video/share/nVPJVyz67seDbK9Ji5xprhXXsu_6CWe6?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
